504 MOVE_SLOW_ADMSN_CD MOVE_SLOW_ADMSN_CD Mood: Moving or speaking so slowly: P (A) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient expressed moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or the opposite – being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more
